title: Adding the additional S axis
description:
Adding the additional S axis

Adding the additional S axis

In
	 the Epson RC+ 8.0 menu, select [Setup]-[System Configuration]-[Robots]-[Robot**]-[Additional
	 Axes].

Click
	 the [Add] button. The dialog shown below appears.

Select
	 "PG" for a motion system.

Select
	 a [PG Board A].

Click
	 the [OK] button. The controller will be restarted.
